column1: # Human review log for cited URLs — the unified resolution log.
# Add a row when:
#   1. You ADD a new entry to src/data/sources.ts. The act of adding a source
#      presupposes a human verified it; the row here is the proof. Without
#      this row, the staleness audit will flag the new source as overdue
#      immediately, by design — forcing the question "did a human actually
#      open this URL?"
#   2. You RESOLVE an audit issue (audit:link or audit:report). Whether the
#      resolution was URL change / data update / removal / "validated as-is,"
#      one row lands here describing what was done.
#   3. You DO A PERIODIC REVIEW (maintainer / trusted reviewer sweep) and
#      have just verified that an existing citation still backs the claim.
# A 200 from curl only tells you something loaded — only a human can tell
# you whether what loaded is still the right document.
# Format: url \t YYYY-MM-DD \t reviewer \t notes (tab-separated)
# Lines starting with # are comments. Keep the format flat — this file is
# joined into the audit results TSV by audit/links/check.sh.
# Reviewer should be your GitHub username (no @ prefix). Renders as a profile
# link in audit/links/status.md.
# url
https://www.hud.gov/hudclips/handbooks/housing-4350-3
column4: HUD Handbook 4350.3 REV-1, Change 4 (Nov 2013). Confirmed the landing page lists the handbook + chapters; Ch. 3 covers occupancy. Replaces the 404'd /sites/dfiles/OCHCO/documents/4350.3.pdf citation.
